Unit tests for JerryScript API, ECMA date helpers, heap, libm, literals, numbers, strings, and memory.


## Files
- **[test-api.c](test-api.c.md)**: Unit tests for the JerryScript API, including function calls, property handling, and error testing.
- **[test-common.h](test-common.h.md)**: Common macros for unit test initialization and assertions in the JerryScript test suite.
- **[test-date-helpers.c](test-date-helpers.c.md)**: Unit tests for ECMA date helper functions in the JerryScript engine.
- **[test-heap.c](test-heap.c.md)**: Unit tests for heap memory allocation and deallocation in the JerryScript engine.
- **[test-libm.c](test-libm.c.md)**: Unit tests for the jerry-libm library, checking integer and double computations.
- **[test-libm.inc.h](test-libm.inc.h.md)**: Tests for mathematical functions like acos, asin, atan, atan2, ceil, exp, fabs, floor, fmod, isnan, log, pow, sqrt, sin, cos, and tan.
- **[test-lit-char-helpers.c](test-lit-char-helpers.c.md)**: Tests for UTF-8 length determination of Unicode sequences in the JerryScript engine.
- **[test-literal-storage.c](test-literal-storage.c.md)**: Unit tests for literal storage functionality in the JerryScript engine.
- **[test-longjmp.c](test-longjmp.c.md)**: Tests the functionality of setjmp and longjmp with recursive calls and assertions.
- **[test-number-to-integer.c](test-number-to-integer.c.md)**: Unit tests for converting ECMAScript numbers to 32-bit unsigned and signed integers.
- **[test-number-to-string.c](test-number-to-string.c.md)**: Unit tests for converting numbers to strings in the JerryScript engine.
- **[test-poolman.c](test-poolman.c.md)**: Unit test for the memory pool manager in the JerryScript engine.
- **[test-string-to-number.c](test-string-to-number.c.md)**: Unit test for converting strings to numbers using the JerryScript API.
- **[test-strings.c](test-strings.c.md)**: Unit tests for CESU-8 string generation and validation in the JerryScript engine.
